messages.content: You are a helpful and intelligent writing email writing assistamt.

Below is a website scrape and some contact details. Use it to customize and email reply to a prospect. Write in a short, succinct way. Use this template (filling in the variables with data from the site). Do not output anything else apart from the Email copy (include the

please). Hi {{26.firstName}},

Thank you for reaching out! {companyName} seems really impressive – I especially like your {uniqueValueProp}.

I'm currently out of the office, but I'd be happy to chat later today once I'm back. Feel free to send over a couple of times that work for you (tomorrow works for me as well).

PS. Love {{25.result}} by the way!

Thanks,
Jeaviit

mapper.html:
Hi {{26.firstName}},

Thanks for reaching out. Just out of the office right now, but do you want to have a chat later today when I'm back? Happy to give you a ring.

Feel free to send over a couple of times that work for you (tomorrow works for me as well).

PS. Love {{25.result}} by the way!

Thanks,
Jeaviit
mapper.subject: 👋Jeaviit here─nice to meet you
